race.comment: Tricky edition of the Bel Esprit Stakes, mainly due to our favourite BUSTLING (12) who resumed off two years here over 1000m under 62kg and actually ran very well all things considering, boxing on well for third. He drops 8kg off that and should be far less rusty. His best WA form as a 2yo saw him get an Everest slot - nothing in this field could dream of that. RECOMMENDATION (3) comes through the G3 John Hawkes Stakes at Morphettville. He likes Caulfield and can give a sight up on speed. BAZABALL REWARDED (14) is a little ripper, beating BUSTLING fresh over 1000m. She's not well off this time and 1100m is a huge query but she deserves her chance. HEARCOMESTHESTAR (13) has been good in two runs back and has claims.
